description: Rafiq Sign Language Gesture Dataset — scalable multi-category gesture library
mvp_note: Signs marked mvp:true are currently detectable by the website rule-based classifier or built-in lightweight motion heuristic. More complex two-hand/body-reference signs still need a trained AI model.
model_note: To connect a trained model, implement connectTrainedModel() in sign-language-model.js and replace SLClassifier.classify() in sign_language.php with your model inference call.

categories.name: Greetings & Communication
categories.description: Basic greeting and social communication signs

categories.name: Emergency & Safety
categories.description: Critical signs for urgent situations and requesting help

categories.name: Medical & Health
categories.description: Signs for medical situations, symptoms, and healthcare

categories.name: Food & Water
categories.description: Signs for food, drinks, and daily nutrition needs

categories.name: Transportation
categories.description: Signs for vehicles, travel, and accessible transportation

categories.name: Daily Communication
categories.description: Everyday numbers, responses, and general communication

categories.name: Accessibility Assistance
categories.description: Signs specific to disability support, care, and accessibility needs

signs.name: Hello
signs.description: Open palm facing camera, all 5 fingers spread wide
signs.how_to: Hold your hand up with palm facing the camera, spread all five fingers apart
signs.geometric_hint: All finger bend angles < 30°, thumb spread laterally away from index MCP

signs.name: Yes
signs.description: Thumb pointing straight up, four fingers curled into fist
signs.how_to: Make a fist and point your thumb straight upward toward the ceiling

signs.name: No
signs.description: Index finger + pinky extended up, middle + ring + thumb folded in
signs.how_to: Extend your index finger and pinky, curl the middle and ring fingers, tuck the thumb
signs.geometric_hint: I:ext P:ext M:curl R:curl T:in — horn shape

signs.name: Thank You
signs.description: Thumb, index, and middle fingers up; ring and pinky folded
signs.how_to: Extend thumb, index, and middle fingers together, curl ring and pinky down

signs.name: I Love You
signs.description: Thumb, index, and pinky extended; middle and ring folded (ASL ILY)
signs.how_to: Spread thumb, index, and pinky outward — curl middle and ring fingers in
signs.geometric_hint: T:out I:ext M:curl R:curl P:ext — ILY/love handshape

signs.name: Please
signs.description: Flat hand (B handshape) moves in circular motion on chest
signs.how_to: Place flat open hand on chest and move it in a circular motion
signs.requires_model: LSTM — requires detecting circular hand trajectory over 20+ frames

signs.name: Sorry
signs.description: Closed fist (A handshape) rotates in circular motion on chest
signs.how_to: Make a fist, place it on your chest, and move it in a circular motion
signs.requires_model: LSTM — circular fist trajectory over chest

signs.name: Goodbye
signs.description: Open hand waves side to side.
signs.how_to: Open your palm and wave it left and right.
signs.requires_model: Built-in lightweight motion heuristic: open palm with side-to-side wrist movement.

signs.name: You're Welcome
signs.description: Flat hand sweeps inward from chin

signs.name: Emergency
signs.description: Tight closed fist, all fingers curled in, thumb across
signs.how_to: Make a tight fist with all fingers curled and thumb resting across them — hold it up clearly
signs.geometric_hint: All bend angles > 70°, thumbUpward < 0.3 (not pointing up)

signs.name: Help
signs.description: Four fingers straight up together, thumb tucked across palm
signs.how_to: Hold four fingers straight up, tuck your thumb across your palm
signs.geometric_hint: I:ext M:ext R:ext P:ext T:tuck — thumb close to palm center

signs.name: Stop
signs.description: Flat open palm thrust forward — distinct stop gesture
signs.requires_model: Requires palm-facing-forward orientation detection (depth axis) — future z-axis classifier
signs.landmark_pattern: palm:forward T:out I:ext M:ext R:ext P:ext

signs.name: Danger
signs.description: D-handshape moves downward sharply

signs.name: Call Ambulance
signs.description: Phone/Y handshape, thumb and pinky extended while the other fingers are curled.
signs.how_to: Extend your thumb and pinky like a phone shape and curl the other fingers.

signs.name: Hospital
signs.description: Peace sign — index and middle fingers only, others folded
signs.how_to: Extend only index and middle fingers in a V or peace sign shape
signs.geometric_hint: I:ext M:ext R:curl P:curl T:in — V/peace shape

signs.name: Pain / Hurt
signs.description: Both index fingers point at each other with twisted motion
signs.requires_model: Two-hand static classifier + optional motion component

signs.name: Medicine
signs.description: Middle finger flicks off thumb in small repeated motion

signs.name: Doctor
signs.description: D-handshape taps wrist (pulse-taking gesture)
signs.requires_model: LSTM — D-handshape tapping motion on wrist

signs.name: Sick
signs.description: Bent middle finger touches forehead then stomach
signs.requires_model: LSTM — body-reference gesture, requires pose estimation

signs.name: Allergy
signs.description: Index finger moves from nose downward

signs.name: Water
signs.description: Index, middle, ring fingers up forming W shape; thumb and pinky folded
signs.how_to: Extend your index, middle, and ring fingers upward to form a W shape, keep thumb and pinky down
signs.geometric_hint: I:ext M:ext R:ext P:curl T:in — W handshape

signs.name: Food / Eat
signs.description: One-hand pinch gesture with thumb close to the index and middle fingertips.
signs.how_to: Bring your thumb close to your index and middle fingertips, as if holding a small bite.
signs.geometric_hint: thumb-index close, thumb-middle close, fingers partly curled

signs.name: Hungry
signs.description: C-handshape moves downward on chest (empty stomach)

signs.name: Thirsty
signs.description: Index finger traces down the throat

signs.name: Hot
signs.description: Bent hand near mouth, opens outward quickly (like blowing)

signs.name: Cold
signs.description: Both fists tremble/shake (shivering motion)

signs.name: Car / Driver
signs.description: Both hands grip and steer imaginary steering wheel

signs.name: Wheelchair
signs.description: Both index fingers roll forward (wheel rotation)

signs.name: Taxi
signs.description: Bent index finger waves down (hailing motion)

signs.name: Bus
signs.description: Both B-handshapes pull apart (bus doors opening)

signs.name: One
signs.description: Only index finger extended upward; all other fingers closed
signs.how_to: Point your index finger straight up, curl all other fingers and the thumb into your palm
signs.geometric_hint: I:ext M:curl R:curl P:curl T:in — single index up

signs.name: Bad
signs.description: Thumbs DOWN — fist with thumb pointing toward floor
signs.how_to: Make a fist and point your thumb straight downward toward the floor
signs.geometric_hint: thumbUpward < -0.35 (tip below wrist), all 4 fingers curled

signs.name: More
signs.description: All fingertips pinched inward toward the thumb.
signs.how_to: Bring your fingertips inward toward your thumb in a tight pinch.
signs.geometric_hint: all fingertips close to thumb, fingers bent

signs.name: Finished / Done
signs.description: Both open hands flip outward from wrists simultaneously

signs.name: Wait
signs.description: Both open hands wiggle fingers (bent at knuckles)

signs.name: Understand
signs.description: Index finger flicks up from closed fist at forehead level
signs.requires_model: LSTM — index flick at head level

signs.name: Caregiver
signs.description: One flat hand cradles the other (nurturing/care gesture)

signs.name: Interpreter
signs.description: Both index fingers alternate pointing left-right repeatedly

signs.name: Blind
signs.description: V-handshape touches eyes with fingertips, then moves away

signs.name: Deaf
signs.description: Index finger touches ear then chin (ear to mouth)

signs.name: Accessible
signs.description: Both hands move outward from center (open/available)
signs.requires_model: LSTM — bilateral opening motion from center

static_classifier_v3.notes: No training data required. Works offline. Sensitive to hand orientation in poor lighting.

static_classifier_v4.method: TensorFlow.js MLP trained on ASL/ArSL landmark dataset
static_classifier_v4.training_input: Flattened 21×3=63 float32 landmark vector per frame
static_classifier_v4.recommended_dataset: ASL Alphabet Dataset (Kaggle) + custom Rafiq recordings
static_classifier_v4.notes: Replace SLClassifier.classify() with connectTrainedModel(). Smoother stays identical.

dynamic_classifier_v1.method: LSTM / Transformer trained on landmark sequences
dynamic_classifier_v1.training_input: Sequence of 30 frames × 21 landmarks × 3 coords = [1, 30, 63] tensor
dynamic_classifier_v1.notes: Required for all signs marked type:dynamic. Integrate via connectTrainedModelDynamic().

full_nlp_v1.method: Continuous sign language recognition + NLP sentence parsing
full_nlp_v1.notes: Full sentence-level sign language understanding. Requires large labelled video dataset.
